per_episode.task_description: Pick up the brown pinecone keychain with charm and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl

Pick up the remote and place it in or on the gray bowl
Pick up the slender green pointed metal tool and place it in or on the glossy hemispherical ceramic bowl smooth
Pick up the card and place it in or on the gray cracked stone bowl
Pick up the curved metallic hunting knife with handle and place it in or on the textured ceramic bowl with colors
Pick up the golden brown crescent croissant and place it in or on the rustic bowl
Pick up the tall copper cup with ridges and place it in or on the colorful pixelated ramen bowl
